goal: Implement all missing gad-tools verbs: init new-project (with JSON output), init *-op variants, config-new-project, config-ensure-section, generate-claude-md, generate-dev-preferences, resolve-model, commit-to-subrepo, state-snapshot, state extended subcommands, roadmap update-plan-progress, requirements mark-complete, verify/validate/uat subcommands, milestone complete, phases list, phase-plan-index, profile-questionnaire, profile-sample, write-profile, generate-claude-profile, generate-slug, scan-sessions, docs-init, progress bar, audit-uat, todo match-phase, summary-extract, workstream, frontmatter get — all backed by gad-config.toml + XML readers where possible, otherwise stubbed with clear error
